mapper.sql:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.CTKEY , H.CTNM , A.OWKEY , A.IVCHGDATE , A.IVHSKEY , A.IVHSTYPECD , A.ICKEY , N.ICNM , L.CTGNM AS CTG_LV_NM1 , K.CTGNM AS CTG_LV_NM2 , J.CTGNM AS CTG_LV_NM3 , COALESCE(M.ASRTMASICKEY, A.ICKEY) AS ASRTMASICKEY , COALESCE(O.ICNM, N.ICNM) AS ASRTMASICNM , CASE WHEN M.ASRTDTICKEY IS NOT NULL THEN A.ICKEY ELSE COALESCE(M.ASRTMASICKEY, A.ICKEY) END AS ASRTDTICKEY , CASE WHEN M.ASRTDTICKEY IS NOT NULL THEN N.ICNM ELSE COALESCE(O.ICNM, N.ICNM) END AS ASRTDTICNM , P.ICUNITQTY AS INN_ICUNITQTY , Q.ICUNITQTY AS CTN_ICUNITQTY , I.SLPRC , A.FRLCKEY , C.ZNKEY AS FRZNKEY , C.ZNNM AS FRZNNM , D.ARKEY AS FRARKEY , D.ARNM AS FRARNM , A.FRIVSERIALNO , A.TOLCKEY , F.ZNKEY AS TOZNKEY , F.ZNNM AS TOZNNM , G.ARKEY AS TOARKEY , G.ARNM AS TOARNM , A.TOIVSERIALNO , A.UOM , CASE WHEN A.QTY > 0 THEN ROUND(A.QTY / COALESCE(R.ICUNITQTY, 1),2) ELSE A.QTY END AS QTY_UNIT , A.QTY , I.SLPRC * A.QTY AS IV_AMT , S.BARCODE , A.FRBFCHGQTY , A.TOBFCHGQTY , A.IBHDKEY , A.IBDTKEY , A.OBHDKEY , A.OBDTKEY , A.PIHDKEY , A.PIDTKEY , A.TAHDKEY , A.TADTKEY , A.IVMOVERSNCD , A.IVMOVEDTCONT , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVHS A LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.FRLCKEY = B.LCKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN C ON B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.ZNKEY = C.ZNKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR D ON B.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND B.ARKEY = D.ARKEY AND B.ZNKEY = D.ZNKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.TOLCKEY = E.LCKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN F ON E.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND E.ZNKEY = F.ZNKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR G ON E.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND E.ARKEY = G.ARKEY AND E.ZNKEY = G.ZNKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC I ON A.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = I.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = I.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG J ON A.CTKEY = J.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = J.OWKEY AND I.CTGKEY = J.CTGKEY AND J.CTGLV = '3' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG K ON A.CTKEY = K.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = K.OWKEY AND J.UPRCTGKEY = K.CTGKEY AND K.CTGLV = '2' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG L ON A.CTKEY = L.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = L.OWKEY AND K.UPRCTGKEY = L.CTGKEY AND L.CTGLV = '1' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ASRT M ON A.CTKEY = M.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = M.ASRTDTICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC N ON A.CTKEY = N.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = N.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = N.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_IC O ON M.CTKEY = O.CTKEY AND M.OWKEY = O.OWKEY AND M.ASRTMASICKEY = O.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE P ON A.CTKEY = P.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = P.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = P.ICKEY AND P.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE Q ON A.CTKEY = Q.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = Q.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = Q.ICKEY AND Q.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE R ON A.CTKEY = R.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = R.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = R.ICKEY AND A.UOM = R.ICUNITTYPECD LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE S ON A.CTKEY = S.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = S.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = S.ICKEY AND S.UOM = 'EA' ) WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
